value.fullName: I am responsible for the decision to work with your business
value.label: I am responsible for the decision to work with your business

value.fullName: I am involved in the ongoing purchasing of your products and services
value.label: I am involved in the ongoing purchasing of your products and services

value.fullName: I provide input into the decision to work with your business
value.label: I provide input into the decision to work with your business

value.fullName: I use your products and services that are made available to me
value.label: I use your products and services that are made available to me
